description_long: This house features a sprawling, multi-section layout with a combination of two main structures connected by a walkway. The larger section has a complex, multi-gabled terracotta roof and numerous white-framed windows arranged in symmetrical rows, giving it a stately appearance. The smaller section resembles a guest house or annex, also with a terracotta gable roof and a small porch area adorned with greenery. The main entrance is prominent, featuring double doors, a paved driveway, and a wide front path. The exterior walls are finished in white, contrasting with the warm roof tiles and muted green doors. The property includes paved walkways and a driveway, suggesting ample access and a suburban or upscale neighborhood context.
description: A large, white two-part house with terracotta gabled roofs, symmetrical windows, and a prominent entryway, connected by paved walkways and a driveway.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, double doors, large windows, and the driveway leading to the garage.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the house, the annex structure, and the alignment of the roofs.
description_view_2: Rear angled view displaying the back facades, window arrangements, and the connection between the two main sections.
description_view_3: Back view showing the rear walls, chimney, and the spatial relationship between the main house and annex.
attribute_entryway_design: Double front doors with a paved approach, flanked by large windows and a modest overhang, with a separate porch on the annex.
